title: Fix existing foundations (low risk, high value)
body: 1. Add `status` column to `aips_trending_topics`; 2. Fire a notification when scheduled research produces new topics; 3. Fix deduplication by calling `topic_exists()` inside `save_research_batch`; 4. Move controller instantiation out of `research.php`.

title: The Research Inbox (medium effort, very high value)
body: 1. Approve pending topic (set status=approved); 2. Generate Post Now action; 3. Schedule for Generation action; 4. Assign to Author action; 5. Create Author from Topic action; 6. Create Template from Topic action; 7. Dismiss pending topic (set status=dismissed).

title: Multiple Research Sources (high value, requires new architecture)
body: 1. Introduce `AIPS_Research_Source` interface; 2. Implement `AIPS_AI_Research_Source`; 3. Implement `AIPS_RSS_Research_Source`; 4. Implement `AIPS_Site_Gap_Research_Source`; 5. Implement `AIPS_Seasonal_Research_Source`.

title: Research Profiles (replaces raw aips_research_niches option)
body: 1. Create `aips_research_profiles` table with profile fields (niche, source, frequency, topic_count, auto_approve_threshold, default_template_id, default_author_id, notify_on_results, rss_feeds, is_active); 2. Add Research Settings tab with CRUD for profiles; 3. Migrate existing `aips_research_niches` option data into `aips_research_profiles` and switch scheduler reads to repository.
